<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band14_chunk001.pdf#page=15 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band14 p28 -->

<!-- header: INGOLSTADT HL. GEIST -->

<!-- header: INGOLSTADT HL. GEIST -->


[[File:Band14_chunk001_p015_img001.jpg|thumb|7 Fortitudo, 18 Oratio, 19 Prudentia, 20 Temperantia]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band14 p29 -->
